summary: Plan-mode PR inventory classification only. The deterministic validator flagged #78635, #78696, and #78742 as security-sensitive targets, so those exact PRs are quarantined with non-mutating route_security actions. The remaining 7 listed PRs stay independently classified; no shared canonical, close, label, comment, merge, or fix action is planned.
